subcodes.first_line: The Book is sent down from Our presence unto a people who understand. Verily, it hath been revealed in truth from God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting, that they who remember may know [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا لقوم یفقهون انه نزل بالحق من الله المهیمن القیوم لیعرف الذاکرون
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
